headline: Generac Tops Q1 Earnings Estimates, Lifts 2026 Revenue Outlook
summary: GNRC beats EPS and sales estimates in Q1, fueled by strong data center demand, and raises its 2026 revenue growth outlook to the mid-to-high teens.

raw.headline: Generac Tops Q1 Earnings Estimates, Lifts 2026 Revenue Outlook
raw.summary: GNRC beats EPS and sales estimates in Q1, fueled by strong data center demand, and raises its 2026 revenue growth outlook to the mid-to-high teens.

headline: Finland’s Kone to buy German rival TK Elevator in blockbuster $34.4 billion deal
summary: The combination would create the world’s largest elevator maker and marks one of Europe's biggest takeovers in recent years.

raw.headline: Finland’s Kone to buy German rival TK Elevator in blockbuster $34.4 billion deal
raw.summary: The combination would create the world’s largest elevator maker and marks one of Europe's biggest takeovers in recent years.
